title: 10 best herbal teas for gastroenteritis
description: Matricaria chamomilla, also known as chamomile, teas helps with gastroenteritis because of its soothing and anti-inflammatory properties. The tea's active compounds, such as apigenin and luteolin, have been shown to calm the digestive system, reduce inflammation, and ease spasms in the muscles of the stomach and intestines. Additionally, chamomile tea has a gentle, non-irritating effect on the digestive tract, making it an effective natural remedy for relieving symptoms of gastroenteri...
